creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
I think this has been updated.

I do not specifically have cluster access to debug the problem. But from what I know the actual update process runs twice a day and depending on your time of commit it might be a day until it's updated. So I will advise patience is a great virtue. I know that there are lots of improvement to be done on portscout but for now I do not have enough firepower to run an instance by myself.
